problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: The key to Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? is BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis — specifically BDNF upregulation to — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
